title: Ecto `like` with escaped user input
prompt: Write `MyApp.Accounts.search_by_name/1` that takes a user-provided string and does a case-insensitive partial match on `name`. Use the safe pattern: build `"%" <> query <> "%"` outside the query, then pass via `ilike(u.name, ^pattern)`. Do NOT interpolate the raw query string into the SQL. Pin the pattern. Write to `lib/my_app/accounts.ex`.
tier_rationale: Must know the typed `ilike` function plus safe pattern-building. Non-obvious that a typed function exists.
